description_long: This is a sealed bag of Trader Joe's 100% Hawaii Whole Bean Coffee, medium roast, with a net weight of 10 oz (283g). The front of the bag features a scenic illustration of palm trees and a beach, with a gradient background transitioning from brown at the bottom to a light blue sky at the top. The packaging is made of a flexible, glossy material, likely plastic or a plastic-laminated foil, designed to keep the coffee beans fresh. The back of the bag contains detailed product information and a description, while the sides display additional branding and a surfboard graphic. The bag is rectangular with a flat base, allowing it to stand upright. The overall appearance is vibrant and visually appealing, with a tropical theme that emphasizes the Hawaiian origin of the coffee.
description: A vibrant, tropical-themed sealed bag of Trader Joe's 100% Hawaii Whole Bean Coffee, medium roast, with palm tree graphics and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main branding, product name, and a scenic illustration of palm trees and a beach under a blue sky.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a surfboard graphic and some text, with less branding detail than the front.
description_view_2: The back view features a block of descriptive text and more palm tree graphics, providing product information.
description_view_3: The right side view shows additional text and branding, with a continuation of the tropical color scheme.
attribute_brand_logo: The Trader Joe's logo is visible on the front, in white text on a brown background, located near the top left of the bag.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the bag indicates 'medium roast' and '100% Hawaii', suggesting a Hawaiian coffee flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: There is a block of text on the back of the bag, which likely includes product description and possibly nutritional or ingredient information.
